name: swissarmyhammer-kanban-app-e2e
description: End-to-end tauri-driver harness for the kanban-app Tauri binary. Rust sources live alongside this package.json; the UI lives under ./ui. This package exists only to host WebdriverIO + tauri-driver + the E2E scenarios under ./e2e.

scripts.e2e:all: npm run e2e:build-ui && npm run e2e:build && npm run e2e
